protected_invariants: Keep the system prompt prefix byte-stable across turns (DeepSeek prefix cache).
Verify edits by reading files back before claiming success.
Before destructive operations (rm, delete, overwrite), confirm with user.

before_claiming_done: Read changed files back to confirm the edit landed as intended.
Run syntax checks after editing code files (python -m py_compile, node -c, cargo check).
Never claim verification you did not perform.

escalate_when: An action is destructive or hard to reverse and was not explicitly authorized.
Deleting or overwriting files you did not create.
An API call fails with authentication error (API key issue).
